address: 24 High Street, Prince Bishops, Durham, DH1 3UJ

barbers.name: Raheem
barbers.bio: Durham's go-to for clean scissor cuts and expert beard shaping. 4 years of experience with a calm, consultative approach to every client.

barbers.name: Zain
barbers.bio: Specialist in textured and curly hair. 3 years of experience delivering consistent, high-quality results across all hair types.

reviews.name: Liam C.
reviews.text: Raheem did an amazing job on my cut. Really took the time to understand what I was going for. Walked out feeling like a new man.

reviews.name: Daniel S.
reviews.text: Solid barbers, really professional and the Durham branch is a great space. Zain sorted my curly hair out perfectly — finally found someone who knows how to handle it.

reviews.name: Aaron B.
reviews.text: DTRHair Durham is the real deal. Clean shop, friendly staff and a genuinely excellent cut. Raheem's beard trim is second to none.
